scripts.dev: concurrently "bun --cwd packages/server dev" "bun --cwd packages/client dev" "bun --cwd packages/server-manager dev"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently "bun --cwd packages/shared typecheck" "bun --cwd packages/client typecheck" "bun --cwd packages/server typecheck" "bun --cwd packages/server-manager typecheck"
